goals.title: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, an...
goals.objective: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, and plan-structure. Treat them as failed product features, not merely hidden surfaces. Sequence safely: first map dependencies, then remove user-facing CLI/GUI/docs surfaces, then remove or retire MCP patch tools and core CodeSpeak/patch pipeline only when replacement host-AI/MCP/project-rule workflows remain intact. Preserve supported workflows: vib start, checkpoint, doctor, guard, anchor, manual, rules, planning room/vib plan, anchor_read_content/project_map_get MCP tools, checkpoint/undo/history, docs viewer. Use TDD and real-surface QA for each goal. Avoid deleting historical release notes/research docs unless they are active guidance.

goals.objective: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, and plan-structure. Treat them as failed product features, not merely hidden surfaces. Sequence safely: first map dependencies, then remove user-facing CLI/GUI/docs surfaces, then remove or retire MCP patch tools and core CodeSpeak/patch pipeline only when replacement host-AI/MCP/project-rule workflows remain intact. Preserve supported workflows: vib start, checkpoint, doctor, guard, anchor, manual, rules, planning room/vib plan, anchor_read_content/project_map_get MCP tools, checkpoint/undo/history, docs viewer. Use TDD and real-surface QA for each goal. Avoid deleting historical release notes/research docs unless they are active guidance.

goals.title: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, an...
goals.objective: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, and plan-structure. Treat them as failed product features, not merely hidden surfaces. Sequence safely: first map dependencies, then remove user-facing CLI/GUI/docs surfaces, then remove or retire MCP patch tools and core CodeSpeak/patch pipeline only when replacement host-AI/MCP/project-rule workflows remain intact. Preserve supported workflows: vib start, checkpoint, doctor, guard, anchor, manual, rules, planning room/vib plan, anchor_read_content/project_map_get MCP tools, checkpoint/undo/history, docs viewer. Use TDD and real-surface QA for each goal. Avoid deleting historical release notes/research docs unless they are active guidance.

goals.title: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, an...
goals.objective: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, and plan-structure. Treat them as failed product features, not merely hidden surfaces. Sequence safely: first map dependencies, then remove user-facing CLI/GUI/docs surfaces, then remove or retire MCP patch tools and core CodeSpeak/patch pipeline only when replacement host-AI/MCP/project-rule workflows remain intact. Preserve supported workflows: vib start, checkpoint, doctor, guard, anchor, manual, rules, planning room/vib plan, anchor_read_content/project_map_get MCP tools, checkpoint/undo/history, docs viewer. Use TDD and real-surface QA for each goal. Avoid deleting historical release notes/research docs unless they are active guidance.

Preserve supported workflows: vib start, checkpoint, doctor, guard, anchor, manual, rules, planning room/vib plan, anchor_read_content/project_map_get MCP tools, checkpoint/undo/history, docs viewer. Use TDD and real-surface QA for each goal. Avoid deleting historical release notes/research docs unless they are active guidance.

goals.title: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, an...
goals.objective: Remove failed legacy VibeLign features in order: patch, CodeSpeak, and plan-structure. Treat them as failed product features, not merely hidden surfaces. Sequence safely: first map dependencies, then remove user-facing CLI/GUI/docs surfaces, then remove or retire MCP patch tools and core CodeSpeak/patch pipeline only when replacement host-AI/MCP/project-rule workflows remain intact. Preserve supported workflows: vib start, checkpoint, doctor, guard, anchor, manual, rules, planning room/vib plan, anchor_read_content/project_map_get MCP tools, checkpoint/undo/history, docs viewer. Use TDD and real-surface QA for each goal. Avoid deleting historical release notes/research docs unless they are active guidance.
